title: The Dead Battery
content: While traveling by bus, I noticed that my phone battery was almost empty. I had forgotten to charge it the night before. A few minutes later, the battery died completely. Without my phone, I could not check maps or send messages. Fortunately, I carried a portable charger in my backpack. After connecting it, the phone started charging again. Since that day, I always check the battery level before leaving home. A charged device can be very important during a busy day.
